data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user decisions by minimizing choices.
data.technical_spec: Limits options on interface to reduce user decision time.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes the size and distance of interactive objects.
data.technical_spec: Targets are sized and positioned for easy accessibility.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Uses patterns and symmetry to create an organized layout.
data.technical_spec: Arranges elements in groups to facilitate perception.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user’s mental models by meeting their expectations.
data.technical_spec: Maintains consistency with familiar web experiences.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Manages cognitive load by chunking information into manageable parts.
data.technical_spec: Information is grouped into smaller segments for enhanced comprehension.
